note: Events drawn from the White Plains / WPCNA community calendar.

events.title: Funny Bunny Egg Hunt
events.location: White Plains High School North Gym
events.summary: A spring egg hunt for kids, with advance registration and a White Plains High School rain location.
events.source: City of White Plains Recreation & Parks

events.title: Common Council Meeting
events.summary: A public Common Council meeting at City Hall.

events.title: STEAM Saturday
events.location: White Plains Public Library, Galaxy Hall
events.summary: Hands-on STEAM time for kids in grades 4 through 8 at the White Plains Public Library.

events.title: "Energize U" Energy Efficiency Workshop
events.summary: A workshop on lowering energy bills, with dinner and a free conservation kit.

events.title: English Conversation Group
events.location: White Plains Public Library Community Room
events.summary: A free drop-in group for adults who want to practice everyday English.

events.title: Catch Me If You Can
events.summary: A spring run of the musical at the White Plains Performing Arts Center.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Wing Walk 2026
events.summary: A ticketed wing tasting across downtown White Plains, with voting and stops at local restaurants.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Rock the Block 2026
events.summary: A free downtown street series with live music, food, games, and room to hang out.

events.title: WPCNA Neighborhood Workshop
events.summary: Workshop materials from WPCNA's first annual session for people starting or reviving neighborhood associations.
events.source: White Plains Council of Neighborhood Associations

events.title: Final Vision Zero Public Meeting
events.summary: A public meeting on White Plains street safety and the next steps in the Vision Zero plan.

events.title: Arbor Day in White Plains
events.summary: An Arbor Day event shared through the WPCNA archive and kept here with its flyer.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Wing Walk 2025
events.summary: A downtown wing tasting with voting, timed entry, and stops at restaurants around White Plains.

events.title: Rock the Block 2025
events.summary: A downtown summer series with live music, food, and family activities on Mamaroneck Avenue.

events.title: Block-toberfest
events.summary: A free fall block party with music, games, vendors, and family activities downtown.

events.title: Downtown White Plains Holiday Market
events.location: White Plains City Center, former Barnes & Noble space
events.summary: An indoor holiday market with local vendors in the former Barnes & Noble space at City Center.

events.title: Vision Zero Public Meeting
events.summary: A public meeting about street safety in White Plains and the Vision Zero Action Plan.

events.title: Vision Zero Action Plan Stakeholder Meeting
events.summary: A stakeholder meeting on White Plains street safety, plan goals, and early findings.

events.title: Downtown Revitalization Initiative Public Workshop
events.summary: A public workshop on downtown White Plains priorities like open space, public art, and bike lanes.
